name: clearai-frontend-bff
description: Azure Static Web Apps managed-function BFF for ClearAI. Forwards SPA /api/* calls to APIM with an Entra client-credentials Bearer token. Holds APIM subscription key + Entra client_secret server-side so the SPA bundle ships zero credentials. See docs/SECURITY-REMEDIATION-PLAN.md §1 (Option A) for the full architecture.
